nasb.text: The face of the Lord is against evildoers, To cut off the memory of them from the earth.

esv.text: The face of the Lord is against those who do evil, to cut off the memory of them from the earth.

cnv.text: 耶和華的臉敵對作惡的人， 要把他們的名從世上除掉。

ccb.text: 耶和华严惩作恶之人， 从世上铲除他们。

csbs.text: 耶和华的脸敌对作恶的人， 要把他们的名号从地上剪除。
